channel.title: Ham Radio Extra Class 2024-2028
channel.description: Amateur Radio Extra Class Question Pool 2024-2028. Audio study guide with questions and correct answers for each section.
channel.itunes:author: Ham Radio Study

item.title: Section E0 - Safety (12 questions)
item.description: E0: Commission's Rules - Safety. Covers RF safety, hazardous voltages, and safety practices. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E0A01

item.title: Section E1 - Commission's Rules (68 questions)
item.description: E1: Commission's Rules. Covers operating standards, station control, and frequency privileges. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E1A01

item.title: Section E2 - Operating Procedures (60 questions)
item.description: E2: Operating Procedures. Covers satellites, EME, spread spectrum, and digital modes. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E2A01

item.title: Section E3 - Radio Wave Propagation (39 questions)
item.description: E3: Radio Wave Propagation. Covers ionospheric propagation, transequatorial, and scatter modes. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E3A01

item.title: Section E4 - Amateur Practices (63 questions)
item.description: E4: Amateur Practices. Covers receivers, transmitters, and test equipment. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E4A01

item.title: Section E5 - Electrical Principles (49 questions)
item.description: E5: Electrical Principles. Covers AC/DC theory, resonance, and impedance. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E5A01

item.title: Section E6 - Circuit Components (68 questions)
item.description: E6: Circuit Components. Covers semiconductors, ICs, and digital circuits. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E6A01

item.title: Section E7 - Practical Circuits (99 questions)
item.description: E7: Practical Circuits. Covers filters, oscillators, modulators, and DSP. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E7A01

item.title: Section E8 - Signals and Emissions (48 questions)
item.description: E8: Signals and Emissions. Covers modulation, bandwidth, and signal processing. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E8A01

item.title: Section E9 - Antennas and Feed Lines (93 questions)
item.description: E9: Antennas and Feed Lines. Covers antenna design, patterns, and transmission lines. Study online: https://payne.github.io/ham_radio_question_pool/extra-2024-2028/extra-2024-2028.html#E9A01
